title: Melpomene gracilis
taxonomy: Melpomene gracilis is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification places it within the order Asparagales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Melpomene gracilis is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae, a subfamily that includes many orchid species found in the Americas. The genus Melpomene is a small group of orchids primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. Melpomene gracilis is a species within this genus, recognized by its unique characteristics and growth habits.
